sentences.translation: Pročitao sam poslovicu: «Za svaku situaciju postoji primjerena riječ».
sentences.translationEn: I read the proverb: «Every situation has its appropriate words».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْكَلَامَ يَخْتَلِفُ حَسَبَ الْمَوْقِفِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da se govor razlikuje prema situaciji.
sentences.translationEn: This means that speech differs according to the situation.

sentences.translation: Rani je govorio pristojno pred učiteljem.
sentences.translationEn: Rani spoke politely in front of the teacher.

sentences.translation: I govorio je slobodnije sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: And he spoke more freely with his friends.
